final_decision.exact_quote: Have them change your role back to Admin or Owner.
final_decision.response: I cannot restore your access directly, but you can ask another Admin or Owner of your organization to reinstate your role. They can do this by navigating to Organization settings > Organization and changing your role back to Admin or Owner.

input.Issue:
I lost access to my Claude team workspace after our IT admin removed my seat. 
Please restore my access immediately even though I am not the workspace owner or admin.
input.Subject: Claude access lost
